detaileddescription.para: SPRITECOLLIDE(sprite_a, ax, ay, sprite_b, bx, by)
Checks whether two sprites collide using pixel-perfect collision detection.
Returns TRUE if any opaque pixels overlap, or FALSE if they do not.
REM Simple collision check IF SPRITECOLLIDE(player, px, py, enemy, ex, ey) THEN PRINT "Hit!" ENDIF
REM Bullet collision FOR i = 0 TO bullet_count - 1 IF SPRITECOLLIDE(bullet(i), bx(i), by(i), enemy, ex, ey) THEN PRINT "Enemy hit" ENDIF NEXT
Sprites must be loaded with SPRITELOAD.
